overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character exploring a foggy Pacific Northwest fishing village. The character walks from behind buildings through narrow alleys and onto a wooden pier extending over a misty lake, with atmospheric narrative text appearing on screen. The visual style is cinematic with desaturated cool tones and heavy atmospheric fog.

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a narrow back alley behind rustic buildings. A corrugated metal shed dominates the right side while a blue barrel sits nearby. The character approaches a local man holding a flashlight who stands near the building wall.

segments.scene_description: The character moves through a narrow passage between two wooden buildings. The space is tight with a water tower and American flag visible in the distance. Metal stairs climb the right building while fallen leaves cover the dirt ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: lakeside road with view of foggy mountains

narrative text appears: 'The knives are put with a rattle, the last thing you'll hear'

segments.scene_description: The scene opens to a wide lakeside view with foggy mountains in the background. Narrative text overlays appear sequentially as the character walks past a fish market stand adorned with hanging buoys. The water tower looms closer while utility poles line the dirt road.

scene_state.functional_zone: wooden fishing pier extending over calm water

agents.ego_description: walking along the wooden pier past fishing nets and equipment toward the water's edge

segments.scene_description: The character transitions onto a wooden fishing pier extending over the misty water. Bundles of fishing nets and a metal crane line the walkway while a fisherman stands at the far railing. A small boat bobs in the water nearby as the pier stretches toward the foggy lake.

scene_state.functional_zone: end of pier overlooking foggy lake with distant mountains

events.description: character stops at end of pier to look out at the water and mountains

agents.ego_description: reaching the end of the pier and pausing to look out at the foggy lake and mountain range

notable_agents.action: fisherman continues looking out at water from the right side railing

entered.detail: tall lighthouse structure barely visible through the fog on the right shore

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the end of the wooden pier and stops to gaze across the foggy lake. The fisherman remains at the right railing while misty mountains loom in the distance. A lighthouse is barely visible through the heavy fog on the far shore.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the claustrophobic confines of a village back alley toward the expansive, misty horizon of a lakeside pier. It begins by navigating a narrow passage beside a corrugated metal shed and a blue barrel, moving past a man with a flashlight before squeezing between wooden buildings where metal stairs and fallen leaves line the path. As the space opens up, the camera emerges into a wide lakeside view, passing a fish market stand with hanging buoys and a looming water tower under a sky of foggy mountains. The scene then transitions from the dirt road onto a wooden fishing pier, gliding past bundles of nets and a metal crane toward a lone fisherman and a bobbing boat. Finally, the camera reaches the end of the pier and comes to a halt, gazing across the heavy mist toward a distant, barely visible lighthouse on the far shore.
